title: System Design Mastery Journey
description: A 180-day, 540-hour roadmap from estimation fluency through distributed systems theory, streaming, product-system design, ML infrastructure, and reliability engineering — closing with a full mock-interview loop simulation.

steps.title: SYSTEM DESIGN MASTERY JOURNEY
steps.description:
180 Days · 3 hours/day · 540 hours · 20 Mocks Prepared.

**Legend:** ⭐ = your existing strength (rehearse articulation, don't re-learn) · 🎯 = scored mock interview · 🔑 = phase gate

steps.description: Foundational setup before Day 1 begins.

steps.title: Install Excalidraw / draw.io for diagramming
steps.description: Install Excalidraw / draw.io for diagramming

steps.description: Create markdown notes repo (git-tracked)

steps.description: Set up screen+audio recording for self-review

steps.description: Order/download: Designing Data-Intensive Applications

steps.title: Block 3 hours/day in calendar — non-negotiable

steps.title: 🔁 PARALLEL TRACKS — run alongside all 180 days
steps.description: 🔁 PARALLEL TRACKS — run alongside all 180 days

steps.levelTitle: 🔁 PARALLEL TRACKS — run alongside all 180 days
steps.title: 💻 DSA / Coding — ~5 hrs/week, every week
steps.description:
- Vehicle: your Grand Algorithm project
- Target: NeetCode 150 solved twice; second pass timed
- ⚠️ Most common rejection reason — do NOT let this slip

steps.levelTitle: 🔁 PARALLEL TRACKS — run alongside all 180 days
steps.title: 🗣️ Behavioral / Leadership Principles — ~30 hrs total
steps.description:
- Amazon: 15–20 rehearsed STAR stories mapped to LPs
- Google/Meta/Netflix: lighter, but real
- Source from real work: notification platform, CDC pipeline, incidents

steps.levelTitle: 🔁 PARALLEL TRACKS — run alongside all 180 days
steps.title: 📮 Pipeline — starts Day 120
steps.description:
- Referrals convert far better than cold applications
- Resume must quantify: "100M+ notifications/day", not "worked on notifications"
- Keep Bangla technical writing + GitHub active — real differentiators
